aiDescription:
## Dumpster Rental in DeKalb, Illinois

DeKalb residents trust us to deliver roll-off containers throughout DeKalb County. Our team positions dumpsters and hauls debris from projects across DeKalb, home to NIU. We provide reliable [roll-off dumpster services](/roll-off-dumpster-rental) with same-day delivery.

## Why DeKalb Chooses Dumpster Champs

Flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees. Every rental includes delivery, pickup, and disposal. We protect driveways at no extra cost.

**DeKalb Service Features:**
- Same-day delivery throughout DeKalb County
- Flexible 7 to 14-day rentals
- Driveway protection included
- All sizes: 10 to 40-yard

## DeKalb Dumpster Pricing

| Size | Price | Weight Included | Best For |
|------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| 10 Yard | $495 | 2 tons | Small cleanouts |
| 15 Yard | $550 | 2.5 tons | Garage cleanouts |
| 20 Yard | $595 | 3 tons | Remodeling (Most Popular) |
| 30 Yard | $695 | 4 tons | Full renovation |
| 40 Yard | $795 | 5 tons | Large construction |

*Prices include delivery, pickup, and disposal. Overage: $75/ton.*

## Illinois Climate

DeKalb experiences full Illinois seasons. Spring and fall are ideal for [home renovation projects](/residential-dumpsters). Winter needs flexibility.

Common projects include home renovations, student rental cleanouts, and [construction debris removal](/construction-dumpsters).

## DeKalb Permit Information

Dumpsters on private property typically don't require permits.

Call (888) 860-0710 for DeKalb pricing.

faqs.question: How much is dumpster rental in DeKalb?
faqs.answer: DeKalb rentals start at $495 for 10-yard.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit?
faqs.answer: Private property typically needs no permit.

faqs.question: What size for cleanout?
faqs.answer: Most cleanouts work with 15 or 20-yard.

faqs.question: Best time for projects?
faqs.answer: Spring and fall are ideal.

faqs.question: Do you serve Sycamore?
faqs.answer: Yes! We serve all DeKalb County.
